package.name: aims_gp7wc_support

description.p: OSU AIMS support for Automate 2026 workcell Forging demo (gp7wc)
This package contains physical configuration data and launch files for the Automate 2026 workcell demo at the AIMS Lab @ Ohio State.
All urdfs are based on emperically measured locations provided by acbuynak and ssmith.

Before using any of the configuration files and / or meshes included in this package, be sure to check they are correct for the particular robot model(s) and configuration you intend to use them with.

package.author: Samantha Smith
package.maintainer: Samantha Smith (AIMS Lab @ The Ohio State University)
A.C. Buynak (AIMS Lab @ The Ohio State University)
